ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Response is relevant and consistent with the persona but could be more natural in tone to convey urgency effectively without sounding too formal.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>The response is contextually relevant and maintains persona consistency, but lacks naturalness in tone to improve overall quality.<TAB>Short note: Adequate advice given the situation; however, a more personalized approach could enhance rapport.
The response shows empathy and a calm demeanor, aligning with the persona of the Village Healer while addressing urgency in an appropriate manner without being rushed.
